title: Advanced Admin-Menu
description: Complete GUI solution for server management with essential tools & features.
body:
**Advanced Admin-Menu**
A powerful and intuitive administrative menu system for your Minecraft server!

⚡ **Features**
️Complete Server Management
- Ban/Kick System with player heads
- Server Controls (Restart/Reload)
- Gamemode Switcher
- Time & Weather Control
- Chat Management
- Player Teleportation

⚡**Commands**
⌨️ /adminmenu - Opens the main administrative interface

⚡**Permissions**
- adminmenu.use - Access to the menu
- adminmenu.bypasschat - Bypass chat restrictions

**Why Choose Advanced Admin-Menu?**
User-friendly interface ⚡ Efficient server management ✨ Clean and modern design Regular updates Lightweight ️ Compatible with 1.20.x - 1.21.x

![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40704dc179899b1a33e3a4a2b37f0137dee01065.png)


**Installation**
1️⃣ Download the plugin 2️⃣ Place it in your plugins folder 3️⃣ Restart your server 4️⃣ Enjoy!
